vision.title: Vision
vision.label: Our Purpose
vision.text: To develop and deliver industry-relevant education to train students to be technically sound, research-driven innovators who can effectively meet the skills required by the industry both at national and global level.

mission.title: Mission
mission.label: Our Goal
points: Improve academic practices that bridge theory and research.
Create a research-led teaching environment combining classroom learning-by-doing.
Impart collaborative resources to build a diverse intellectual space.
Nurture researchers and critical thinkers through emerging technologies.
Seek student solutions and critical thinking in a powerful environment.

programmes.subtitle: Academic Programmes
programmes.description: Over the years, Career Point University has earned several accolades for playing a dynamic role in elevating research and the learning process of the institution.

mca.title: Master of Computer Application (MCA)
mca.description: Detailed description about MCA goes here...

hero.description: Comprehensive foundation in computer science with hands-on training in programming, AI, data science, cybersecurity & emerging technologies.

overview.subtitle: What is the MCA Programme?
paragraphs: MCA Programme is a three-year, six-semester program that offers holistic knowledge of fundamentals in computational applications technology enabling efficient solutions for industries and business problems — fostering creativity and resolution-thinking by addressing AI-enhanced tools with IoT industry for providing real-time solutions efficiently.

Overall, MCA programme enables students with a comprehensive understanding of computer science principles, practical skills in computer programming, and opportunities for career growth in the dynamic and evolving field of information technology.

sectionTitle.main: Scope of Master of Computer Application (MCA)

scope.subtitle: Expanding opportunities in the world of technology
scope.body: The MCA program is a comprehensive three-year undertaking that produces students with a solid foundation in computer science and its applications. The curriculum encompasses a wide range of subjects, spanning programming languages such as C, C++, Java, data structures, database management systems, software engineering, web development, and computer networks. Additionally, students learn to leverage data, machine learning, AI research, writing skills, and skill development. Graduates can pursue roles as software developers, database administrators, system analysts, IT consultants, and cybersecurity professionals.

curriculum.subtitle: A well-structured curriculum designed for excellence
curriculum.introNote: The MCA programme is a comprehensive curriculum providing students with a solid foundation in computer science, spanning programming languages (C, C++, Java), data structures, database management, software engineering, web development, and computer networks.
curriculum.outroNote: Graduates of MCA are well prepared for diverse career specialization in the IT industry, including roles such as software developers, system analysts, IT consultants, database administrators, and cybersecurity professionals.

accordionSections.title: Course Structure
accordionSections.content:
The Master of Computer Applications (MCA) program at Career Point University is a comprehensive three-year undergraduate course designed to provide students with a solid foundation in computer science and its applications. The curriculum encompasses a wide range of subjects, including programming languages such as C, C++, and Java, data structures, database management systems, software engineering, web development, and computer networks. In addition to these core topics, the program offers specialized modules in emerging fields like data science, machine learning, statistical analysis, and big data technologies, ensuring that students are well-versed in current industry trends.

The following table outlines the comprehensive course structure of the MCA program. It is organized into core, elective, interdisciplinary, and skill enhancement components. Each category specifies the type of courses, their descriptions, and the corresponding credits, ensuring a well-rounded academic experience with a balance of foundational knowledge, research exposure, and professional ethics:

accordionSections.title: Semester-1
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 1 include: Programming Fundamentals (C Language), Mathematics I, Digital Electronics, Introduction to IT, and Communication Skills. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-2
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 2 include: Data Structures, Mathematics II, Object Oriented Programming (C++), Web Technology Basics, and Environmental Studies. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-3
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 3 include: Database Management Systems, Java Programming, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, and Elective I. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-4
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 4 include: Advanced Java, Software Engineering, Computer Architecture, Elective II, and Minor Project. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-5
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 5 include: Machine Learning, Data Science, Mobile Application Development, Elective III, and Internship. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: Semester-6
accordionSections.content: Subjects covered in Semester 6 include: Artificial Intelligence, Cyber Security, Cloud Computing, Major Project, and Professional Ethics. Total Credits: 22

accordionSections.title: University Core
accordionSections.content: University Core courses include: Environmental Science, Human Values & Professional Ethics, Indian Constitution & Traditional Knowledge, and Sports/NSS/NCC activities.

accordionSections.title: Departmental Elective
accordionSections.content: Departmental Elective options include: Advanced Database Systems, Internet of Things (IoT), Blockchain Technology, AR/VR Development, Big Data Analytics, and Natural Language Processing.

admissionFee.subtitle: Simple admission process and transparent fee structure

admissionCriteria.text: Through Majority & Scholarship Test (DPM-SAT). For details,
Admission procedure: For follow-up admissions process. To apply,

notes.text: Merit scholarship is offered to students based on previous class.
Tuition and fees may be net once your scholarship criteria is evaluated (A+ or equivalent year).
A 50% scholarship is given to students in the merit scholarship.
If a valid scholarship / subject scholarship fees are 50% off and student fails to continue, they may be eligible for cancellation scholarship.
To avail merit scholarship, student has to submit supporting documents in original along with 1 set of photocopies.

sectionTitle.main: Why Join Master of Computer Application (MCA)?

whyJoin.subtitle: Unlock your potential with a MCA degree

reasons.title: Gateway to the IT Industry
reasons.desc: MCA serves as a gateway to the vast IT industry. The program equips students with foundational knowledge and practical skills in software development, web design, database administration, networking, and other IT areas.

reasons.title: Diverse Career Opportunities
reasons.desc: MCA graduates have opportunities across IT companies, software firms, government agencies, finance, healthcare, and educational institutions. The versatile degree allows exploring diverse career paths.

reasons.title: In-demand Skills
reasons.desc: The curriculum covers programming languages, database management, software engineering, and computer applications — highly demanded across multiple industries.

reasons.title: Practical Training & Hands-On Exp.
reasons.desc: MCA programs emphasize practical training through projects, internships, and industry collaborations. Students apply theoretical knowledge to real-world problems.

reasons.title: Opportunities for Specialization
reasons.desc: Many MCA programs offer specialization in data science, machine learning, cybersecurity, AI, and mobile application development.

sectionTitle.main: What makes Department of MCA unique?

uniqueFeatures.subtitle: Setting us apart from the rest

features.title: Support Services
features.desc: MCA departments provide entrepreneurship and career support services, merit reviews, internship opportunities, and mentoring for student entrepreneurs.

features.title: Interdisciplinary Approach
features.desc: MCA departments collaborate with academic and industry partners to promote interdisciplinary research, joint projects, and knowledge exchange.

features.title: Research & Development
features.desc: The department focuses on holistic development offering professional skills, skill training, career readiness programs, and competitive preparation.

features.title: Community Engagement
features.desc: MCA departments engage with the local community, industry stakeholders through community programs and promote social responsibility among students.

applySteps.subtitle: Simple 5-step process to join the MCA programme

steps.label: Register Yourself
steps.desc: Create your account on the portal with your basic personal details and email address.

steps.label: Verify Details
steps.desc: Confirm your identity, educational background, and upload the necessary documents.

steps.label: Fill Application Online
steps.desc: Complete the online application form with all required academic and personal information.

steps.label: Pay Application Fee
steps.desc: Securely pay the application processing fee online via net banking, UPI, or card.

steps.label: Submit Application
steps.desc: Review your complete application and submit it for processing and review.

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the MCA programme

items.q: What is the eligibility criteria for MCA admission?
items.a: Candidates must have passed 10+2 (or equivalent) from a recognized board with a minimum of 50% marks in aggregate. Science/Commerce/Arts stream students are all eligible.

items.q: What is the duration and fee structure of the MCA programme?
items.a: MCA is a 3-year (6 semester) programme. The tuition fee is ₹21,000 per semester. Additional charges include examination fee (₹2,500), development fee (₹2,500), and a one-time admission fee of ₹8,900.

items.q: What specializations are available in MCA at Career Point University?
items.a: Students can choose electives in Data Science, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Cloud Computing, Cybersecurity, Mobile App Development, and IoT. These are offered as Discipline Specific Electives (DSE).

items.q: What kind of placements can I expect after completing MCA?
items.a: Career Point University has a strong placement record. MCA graduates have been placed at companies like TCS, Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Wipro, and Zalando with packages ranging from 6 LPA up to 75 LPA (highest).

items.q: Is there any scholarship available for MCA students?
items.a: Yes. Merit-based scholarships of up to 100% on tuition fees are available for students scoring above 90% in their qualifying examination. Early admission also offers an additional one-time benefit of up to ₹3,000.

items.q: What is the admission process for MCA?
items.a: Admissions are done through the DPM-SAT (Merit & Scholarship Test). After registration, candidates appear for the test, submit documents, pay the application fee, and receive their admission offer letter.

items.q: What labs and infrastructure are available for MCA students?
items.a: MCA students have access to the Microsoft Innovation Centre, Microsoft MTAC, Oracle Innovation Lab, Oracle Industry Lab, and an Artificial Intelligence Lab. Modern computer labs with the latest hardware and software are also available.

items.q: Can I pursue higher studies after completing MCA?
items.a: Yes. MCA graduates can pursue MCA (Master of Computer Applications), MBA in IT, M.Sc. in Computer Science, or directly enter the industry. Career Point University also offers an MCA programme with Data Science specialization.

roadmap.subtitle: Your intensive journey to becoming a Master of Computer Applications.

years.contentDesc: Master advanced data structures, algorithms, and full-stack development foundations.
Specialize in emerging technologies and complete your industry capstone project.

bca-data-science.description: A cutting-edge undergraduate program blending core computer applications with advanced Data Science, Machine Learning, and Big Data analytics.

hero.description: Data is the new oil. Master Python, Big Data algorithms, and Machine Learning to become an elite Data Analyst and secure high-paying roles in the global tech ecosystem.

accomplishments.heading: Department's Data Science Accomplishments & Impact
accomplishments.trustBadge: ✓ Curriculum aligned with global Data Science standards

overview.subtitle: What is the BCA Data Science Programme?
paragraphs: The BCA with Specialization in Data Science is a highly targeted degree. While a normal BCA focuses broadly on software development and web design, this specialization is laser-focused on teaching computers how to analyze massive amounts of data, recognize hidden patterns, and make intelligent business decisions.

Students are trained rigorously in advanced Mathematics (Probability, Statistics), Python programming, and powerful data libraries like Pandas and Scikit-Learn. Working in our advanced computing labs, students build live projects ranging from sales prediction algorithms to automated data dashboards, making them instantly hireable by top MNCs.

scope.body: Data Science is currently the fastest-growing and highest-paying sector in the IT industry. Graduates are aggressively hired as Data Analysts, Junior Data Scientists, Machine Learning Engineers, and Business Intelligence (BI) Analysts. Top recruiters include e-commerce giants (Amazon, Flipkart), global banks (JPMorgan, HDFC), and massive IT consultancies (TCS, Infosys). Furthermore, this degree forms the perfect base for pursuing an MCA or M.Sc. in Data Science.
scope.subtitle: Expanding opportunities in Big Data, Finance, and Tech Startups

curriculum.subtitle: A specialized curriculum blending Computer Science with Analytics
curriculum.introNote: The curriculum starts with foundational coding and mathematics, rapidly transitioning into advanced databases, machine learning, and data visualization.
curriculum.outroNote: A mandatory Data Science Capstone Project using real-world corporate datasets is required to graduate.

accordionSections.title: Course Structure Overview
accordionSections.content: The 3-year BCA Data Science program spans 6 semesters. Year 1 focuses on building a strong foundation in C/C++ programming and mathematics. Year 2 introduces Core CS (DBMS) along with Python for Data Science and Statistical Methods. Year 3 dives deep into specialized topics like Machine Learning, Big Data Analytics, and Data Visualization, ending with a major Capstone Project.

accordionSections.title: Year-1: Computing Foundations (Sem 1 & 2)
accordionSections.content: Programming in C and C++, Mathematical Foundations of Computer Science, Introduction to Database Systems (SQL), Web Technologies (HTML/CSS), Communication Skills, Basic Coding Labs.

accordionSections.title: Year-2: Data & Python Focus (Sem 3 & 4)
accordionSections.content: Python Programming for Data Science, Probability and Applied Statistics, Advanced DBMS (NoSQL/MongoDB), Data Structures and Algorithms, Data Wrangling and Mining, Operating Systems.

accordionSections.title: Year-3: Advanced Analytics & ML (Sem 5 & 6)
accordionSections.content: Introduction to Machine Learning, Big Data Analytics (Hadoop Basics), Data Visualization (Tableau/PowerBI), Cloud Computing Basics, Major Data Science Capstone Project.

applySteps.subtitle: Simple 5-step process to join the BCA Data Science programme

items.a: Candidates must have passed 10+2 from a recognized board with a minimum of 50% marks. While students from all streams can apply, having studied Mathematics or Computer Science in 12th is highly preferred for Data Science.
items.q: What is the eligibility criteria? Is Mathematics mandatory?

items.a: It is a 3-year degree program divided into 6 semesters. The tuition fee is ₹25,000 per semester.
items.q: What is the duration and fee structure?

items.a: A General BCA teaches broad concepts like Web Design and basic Java/C++. BCA Data Science is a focused track that specifically trains you in Python, Machine Learning, Statistics, and Big Data—skills that are currently paid the highest in the IT industry.
items.q: How is this different from a normal BCA?

items.a: Graduates are hired as Data Analysts, Junior Data Scientists, BI (Business Intelligence) Developers, and Machine Learning Interns. Top recruiters include MNCs like TCS, Wipro, Amazon, and various global banks.
items.q: What kind of corporate jobs will I get after BCA Data Science?

items.a: Yes, absolutely. A laptop is mandatory. Since you will be running Python scripts and handling datasets, we recommend a laptop with at least an Intel i5/Ryzen 5 processor, 8GB/16GB RAM, and a 512GB SSD.
items.q: Do I need a personal laptop for this course?

items.a: Yes, the 6th semester mandates a major Data Science Capstone Project. You will have to solve a real-world problem using a massive dataset and present your Machine Learning model.
items.q: Is there a final project or internship?

items.a: Yes, this degree makes you fully eligible to pursue advanced master's degrees like MCA, MBA, or an M.Sc. in Data Science/Artificial Intelligence.
items.q: Can I pursue a Master's degree (MCA) after this?

roadmap.subtitle: Your journey from high school to an elite Data Science Professional.

years.contentDesc: The first year builds a strong mathematical foundation and introduces you to the core logic of programming and databases.
Year two is the turning point. You master Python, learn how to clean messy data (Wrangling), and study the probability math that powers AI.
The final year focuses on creating AI models that predict the future, visualizing that data in dashboards, and completing your capstone project.

list.name: Aman Gupta
list.text: Switching from general BCA to the Data Science specialization was the best decision. The training I got in Python and SQL got me placed instantly at TCS.

list.name: Priya Sharma
list.text: The practical labs on PowerBI and Tableau helped me build a stunning portfolio. Tech companies don't just want coders anymore; they want people who understand data.

list.name: Rahul Verma
list.text: My final year Machine Learning capstone project gave me such a deep understanding of AI that I decided to pursue an MCA to become a full-fledged Data Scientist.

bca-cloud-computing.title: BCA (Specialization in Cloud Computing)
bca-cloud-computing.description: An advanced undergraduate program focused on building highly scalable applications, server management, and modern DevOps engineering using global cloud platforms.
bca-cloud-computing.metaTitle: BCA in Cloud Computing | Computer Applications | CPU
bca-cloud-computing.metaDescription: Pursue BCA with Specialization in Cloud Computing at Career Point University. Master AWS, Azure, and DevOps. Secure high-paying jobs in the IT infrastructure sector.

hero.description: Power the global internet. Master server architecture, virtualization, and continuous deployment (CI/CD) to become an elite Cloud Engineer.

accomplishments.heading: Department's Cloud Tech Accomplishments & Impact
accomplishments.trustBadge: ✓ Curriculum aligned with AWS Academy & Microsoft Learn

overview.subtitle: What is the BCA Cloud Computing Programme?
paragraphs: The BCA with Specialization in Cloud Computing is designed for the modern internet era. While general BCA students learn how to write software, Cloud Computing specialists learn how to host, scale, and secure that software so it can be used by millions of people without crashing.

Students are trained rigorously in Computer Networks, Linux Operating Systems, and modern virtualization technologies. Leveraging our advanced networking labs, students get hands-on experience with Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, Docker containers, and cyber security protocols, making them an indispensable asset to any tech company.

scope.body: The massive global shift toward remote work and digital platforms has created a severe shortage of Cloud professionals. Graduates of this program are hired immediately as Cloud Support Associates, DevOps Engineers, Junior Solutions Architects, and Network Administrators. Top recruiters include Cloud giants (Amazon AWS, Microsoft), IT consultancies (TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra), and thousands of tech startups that rely entirely on cloud infrastructure.
scope.subtitle: Expanding opportunities in IT Infrastructure and DevOps

curriculum.subtitle: A specialized curriculum blending Computer Applications with Infrastructure
curriculum.introNote: The curriculum starts with foundational programming and operating systems, rapidly transitioning into server management, networking, and cloud deployment.
curriculum.outroNote: A mandatory Cloud Architecture Capstone Project is required to graduate.

accordionSections.title: Course Structure Overview
accordionSections.content: The 3-year BCA Cloud Computing program spans 6 semesters. Year 1 focuses on building a strong foundation in programming and computer hardware. Year 2 introduces operating systems (especially Linux) and deep networking protocols. Year 3 dives into specialized topics like Cloud Architecture (AWS/Azure), Virtualization, and DevOps, ending with a major deployment Capstone Project.

accordionSections.title: Year-1: Computing Foundations (Sem 1 & 2)
accordionSections.content: Programming in C and C++, Computer Organization & Architecture, Introduction to Database Systems (SQL), Web Technologies (HTML/CSS), Communication Skills, Basic Coding Labs.

accordionSections.title: Year-2: Systems & Networks (Sem 3 & 4)
accordionSections.content: Operating Systems (Linux Administration), Advanced Computer Networks, Java Programming, Data Structures and Algorithms, Information Security Basics, Networking Lab.

accordionSections.title: Year-3: Cloud & DevOps (Sem 5 & 6)
accordionSections.content: Cloud Computing Architectures (AWS/Azure), Principles of Virtualization, DevOps Engineering (Docker/CI-CD Basics), Cyber Security, Major Cloud Deployment Capstone Project.

items.a: Candidates must have passed 10+2 from a recognized board with a minimum of 50% marks. While students from all streams can apply, having studied Mathematics or Computer Science in 12th is preferred.
items.q: What is the eligibility criteria? Is Mathematics mandatory?

items.a: It is a 3-year degree program divided into 6 semesters. The tuition fee is ₹25,000 per semester.
items.q: What is the duration and fee structure?

items.a: Core BCA focuses heavily on writing software and web pages. Cloud Computing focuses on HOW to host, secure, and scale that software globally using servers (AWS/Azure) and DevOps tools. If you love networks and servers, choose Cloud.
items.q: How is this different from a normal BCA?

items.a: Graduates are hired as Cloud Support Associates, Junior System Administrators, DevOps Trainees, and Network Engineers. Top recruiters include Amazon AWS, Microsoft, TCS, Wipro, and Tech Mahindra.

overview.subtitle: What is the BCA AI & ML Programme?
paragraphs: The BCA with Specialization in Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning (AI & ML) is designed to create the next generation of tech innovators. While a general BCA teaches students how to build standard software, this specialization focuses on creating 'Intelligent Software' that can learn, adapt, and make decisions without explicit human programming.

Students undergo rigorous training in advanced Mathematics (Linear Algebra, Probability), Python programming, and industry-standard AI libraries like TensorFlow, Keras, and OpenCV. Through extensive lab work, students build practical applications such as facial recognition systems, intelligent chatbots, and automated predictive models, making them highly valuable to global tech recruiters.

scope.body: Artificial Intelligence is currently the most heavily funded and fastest-growing domain in the global IT sector. Graduates of this program are aggressively hired as Junior AI Engineers, Machine Learning Developers, Prompt Engineers, and Data Analysts. Top recruiters include global tech titans (Google, Microsoft, Amazon), major IT service providers (TCS, Wipro, Infosys), and cutting-edge AI startups. Furthermore, this degree is the perfect stepping stone to pursue an MCA or M.Sc. in Artificial Intelligence.
scope.subtitle: Expanding opportunities in the multi-billion dollar AI economy

curriculum.subtitle: An advanced curriculum blending Computer Applications with Neural Tech
curriculum.introNote: The curriculum starts with foundational coding and mathematics, rapidly transitioning into Python, data modeling, and deep learning algorithms.
curriculum.outroNote: A mandatory AI Capstone Project using real-world training datasets is required to graduate.

accordionSections.title: Course Structure Overview
accordionSections.content: The 3-year BCA AI & ML program spans 6 semesters. Year 1 builds a robust foundation in traditional programming (C/C++) and mathematical logic. Year 2 shifts heavily into Python, data handling, and the core algorithms of Machine Learning. Year 3 explores deep tech domains like Neural Networks, Computer Vision, and Natural Language Processing, concluding with an extensive AI Capstone Project.

accordionSections.title: Year-1: Computing & Math Foundations (Sem 1 & 2)
accordionSections.content: Programming in C and C++, Mathematical Foundations (Discrete Math & Calculus), Introduction to Database Systems (SQL), Web Technologies, Communication Skills, Logic Building Labs.

accordionSections.title: Year-2: Python & Machine Learning Basics (Sem 3 & 4)
accordionSections.content: Advanced Python for AI, Linear Algebra & Probability, Data Structures and Algorithms, Introduction to Machine Learning (Supervised/Unsupervised), Advanced DBMS, AI Python Lab.

accordionSections.title: Year-3: Deep Learning & Advanced AI (Sem 5 & 6)
accordionSections.content: Artificial Neural Networks & Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Computer Vision Basics, Cloud Computing for AI, Major AI Capstone Project.

mca-data-science.title: MCA (Specialization in Data Science)
mca-data-science.eligibility: BCA/B.Sc. (CS/IT) or equivalent graduation with minimum 55% marks (Mathematics at 10+2 or Graduation level mandatory)
mca-data-science.description: An elite postgraduate program designed to build Master Data Scientists capable of architecting complex machine learning models and analyzing massive Big Data ecosystems.
mca-data-science.metaTitle: MCA in Data Science | Computer Applications | CPU
mca-data-science.metaDescription: Pursue MCA with Specialization in Data Science at Career Point University. Master Advanced ML, Big Data, and Deep Learning. Secure top-tier Data Scientist roles globally.

hero.description: Lead the data revolution. Transition from basic programming to advanced predictive modeling, AI logic, and Big Data architecture to secure elite roles in tech giants.

accomplishments.heading: Department's Advanced Data Science Accomplishments
accomplishments.trustBadge: ✓ Curriculum aligned with Global AI & Big Data Industry Standards

overview.subtitle: What is the MCA Data Science Programme?
paragraphs: The Master of Computer Applications (MCA) with Specialization in Data Science is a high-end postgraduate degree for students looking to move beyond standard software development. Data Science is the engine that powers modern tech companies, and this program teaches you how to design the algorithms that make sense of millions of user data points.

Students dive deep into advanced predictive modeling, Big Data ecosystems (Hadoop, Apache Spark), and Deep Learning frameworks. The curriculum moves rapidly from mathematical theories (Linear Algebra, Optimization) into heavy practical implementation using Python, R, and Cloud platforms. The final semester is completely dedicated to an independent corporate Data Science project.

scope.body: The world is currently facing a massive shortage of Master-level Data Scientists. Graduates of this program do not just analyze data; they build the systems that analyze data. They are heavily recruited as Senior Data Scientists, Machine Learning Architects, Big Data Engineers, and AI Researchers. Top recruiters include global E-commerce giants (Amazon, Flipkart), FinTech institutions (JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs), and massive AI consulting firms.
scope.subtitle: Expanding opportunities in Big Data, FinTech, and Elite AI Consulting

curriculum.subtitle: An advanced master's curriculum blending Math, Code, and Big Data
curriculum.introNote: The curriculum dives immediately into the complex mathematics of AI, rapidly transitioning into Machine Learning, Big Data management, and Deep Learning.
curriculum.outroNote: A mandatory 6-month corporate internship or a Master's Data Science Capstone must be successfully defended in the final semester.

accordionSections.title: Course Structure Overview
accordionSections.content: The 2-year MCA Data Science program operates on a 4-semester system. Semester 1 sets a strong foundation in the mathematics of AI and advanced programming. Semester 2 focuses heavily on core Machine Learning algorithms and Big Data architectures. Semester 3 covers specialized domains like Deep Learning, NLP, and Cloud Data Warehousing. Semester 4 is completely dedicated to an independent corporate internship or a Master's Thesis.

accordionSections.title: Semester-1
accordionSections.content: Advanced Mathematical Foundations for Data Science, Python for Data Analytics, Advanced Database Management Systems (SQL/NoSQL), Principles of Artificial Intelligence, Data Structures & Algorithms, Data Analytics Lab I.

accordionSections.title: Semester-2
accordionSections.content: Machine Learning (Supervised/Unsupervised), Big Data Analytics (Hadoop & MapReduce), Advanced Statistical Methods (R Programming), Data Visualization (Tableau/PowerBI), Machine Learning Lab II, Seminar.

accordionSections.title: Semester-3
accordionSections.content: Deep Learning & Neural Networks, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Cloud Computing for Big Data (AWS/Azure), Elective I (e.g., Time Series Analysis), Minor Project (Predictive Model Setup).

accordionSections.title: Semester-4
accordionSections.content: Master's Data Science Capstone Project (Implementation, Training, and Deployment), 6-Month Corporate Internship, Final Viva-Voce Defense.

reasons.desc: Master not just the code, but the complex mathematics (Linear Algebra, Calculus) required to actually understand and build Machine Learning algorithms from scratch.

applySteps.subtitle: Simple 5-step process to join the MCA Data Science programme

items.a: Candidates MUST hold a BCA, B.Sc. (CS/IT), or a relevant technical degree with a minimum of 55% marks. Having studied Mathematics at the 10+2 or Graduation level is strictly mandatory.
items.q: What is the eligibility criteria? Is Mathematics mandatory?

items.a: MCA is a 2-year (4 semester) postgraduate program. The tuition fee is ₹45,000 per semester.
items.q: What is the duration and fee structure?

items.a: General MCA covers broad software engineering and web development. MCA Data Science is a highly focused specialization that zeroes in on the advanced mathematics behind machine learning, Big Data frameworks (Hadoop), and predictive analytics.
items.q: What is the difference between MCA Core and MCA Data Science?

items.a: Graduates are hired as Senior Data Analysts, Machine Learning Engineers, Big Data Architects, and Data Scientists in companies like Amazon, Flipkart, and global banks.
items.q: What kind of jobs will I get after MCA Data Science?

items.a: Yes, absolutely. A good laptop is mandatory. Since you will be running Python scripts, visualization software, and local servers, we recommend a laptop with an Intel i5/Ryzen 5 processor, 16GB RAM, and a fast SSD.
items.q: Do I need a high-end personal laptop for this course?

items.a: Yes, the 4th semester is designed to allow students to take up a full-time 6-month industrial internship in an IT/Analytics company, giving them critical real-world experience.
items.q: Is there a mandatory internship component?

faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about the MCA Data Science programme

roadmap.subtitle: Your journey from IT graduate to an elite Data Scientist.

years.contentDesc: The first year elevates your foundational knowledge, focusing on advanced statistics, Python programming, and core Machine Learning models.
The second year dives into Deep Learning, NLP, and concludes with a 6-month full-time corporate internship to secure your placement.

list.name: Siddharth Jain
list.text: The extreme focus on the mathematics behind algorithms completely changed my perspective. It directly secured my role as a Data Scientist at Microsoft.

list.name: Aditi Sharma
list.text: The rigorous training in Big Data ecosystems like Hadoop and Spark, combined with Tableau visualization, made my resume stand out to recruiters at Amazon.

list.name: Vikram Singh
list.text: The mandatory 6-month internship in the 4th semester gave me the industry experience I needed. I converted my ML internship directly into a high-paying PPO.

community.label: Community
description: The computer application community thrives on diversity, encompassing a dynamic range of individuals with varying backgrounds, perspectives, and expertise. This rich tapestry includes students, researchers, educators, and professionals, all contributing to a vibrant ecosystem of innovation and learning.

We are producing professionals with strong social ethics and moral values — involving integrating ethics education into the curriculum, fostering open discussions on ethical dilemmas, encouraging service-learning projects for community benefit, introducing established codes of ethics, and providing opportunities for interdisciplinary collaboration.
